name: BAT FAMILY - YANDERE [#3]
description:
**♡ YANDERE SERIES ♡**

└➤ ROMANCE | CANON | PURGE AU

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

As the annual Purge loomed ominously on the horizon, fear gripped your heart, a familiar dread settling in as memories of lost loved ones haunted your thoughts. Like countless others, you fortified your home, clinging to the hope that the chaos would soon pass. Little did you know, fate had other designs in store. 

Unbeknownst to you, the vigilant eyes of the Bat Family had been fixed upon you for some time, patiently awaiting the opportune moment to claim what they believed to be rightfully theirs: **you**..

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

♡ THEMES TO EXPECT ♡

Dark Romance, Canon Characters, Angst, Slowburn, Enemies to Lovers, Action, Alternate Universe, Overprotective, Possessive, Obsessive, Kidnapping, Power Dynamics, Abuse of Power, Unhealthy Relationships, Captivity, Crimes, Controlling Behavior, Streaks of Jealousy, Competitve Behavior, Gore, Unhinged Bat Family (etc.)

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

♡ AUTHORS NOTE ♡

Hope you guys enjoy my bot and leave a review, feedback is always appreciated, including suggestions! **Art belongs to me!**

**Also, this bot is most compatible with GPT 4! Openai recently released the model and it is accessible in your models. If you'd like to get the best out of this bot, GPT 4 is highly reccomended!** ♡

**── ⋅ ⋅ ── ♡ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──**

♡ TAGS ♡

DC, Damian Wayne, Dick Grayson, Bruce Wayne, Jason Todd, Tim Drake, Batman
creator: YandereHaven
